products.name: BeatWave
products.description:
A cinematic animated waveform component featuring a static heartbeat pulse with a traveling white highlight. BeatWave creates an elegant audio-visualization effect where a glowing "train light" smoothly sweeps across a centered oscillation cluster from left to right. The waveform mimics a real sound impulse visualization with a Gaussian envelope that creates natural peaks in the center and flat baselines on the edges. Perfect for hero sections, music/audio-related pages, fintech dashboards, or any design requiring a premium, high-tech visual presence.

Key Features





Static waveform with Gaussian envelope oscillation cluster





Smooth traveling white highlight with multi-layer glow bloom





Asymmetric trailing tail for cinematic "train light" effect





Elegant serif text overlay with automatic positioning





Dot grid background pattern derived from your background color





Built-in responsive scaling — automatically adapts to mobile and tablet





Text auto-centers on smaller screens





60fps butter-smooth canvas animation





Clean, focused property panel for quick customization

Properties

Text: Text Content sets the main headline text. Font Size controls typography scale. Text Color sets the display color. Text Align controls horizontal placement — text position follows automatically.

Wave: Wave Color sets the base waveform stroke color. Amplitude sets the wave peak height. Frequency controls the number of oscillations. Speed controls how fast the highlight travels in pixels per second. Show Glow toggles the multi-layer bloom effect.

Background: Background Color sets the background — the grid dot color is derived automatically. Show Grid toggles the dot pattern on or off.

Best Practices





Use a cream/off-white text color (#F5E6C8) against a deep blue background for high contrast





Keep amplitude between 0.2–0.35 for balanced proportions





Set speed between 120–180 for a calm, cinematic sweep





Enable the glow effect for a more polished, premium appearance





Use text align "right" for desktop layouts — it auto-centers on smaller screens

Use Cases





Hero sections for music, audio, or podcast platforms





Fintech and trading dashboards showing market activity





Healthcare and medical apps displaying heartbeat/vital signs





Technology and SaaS landing pages for a futuristic feel





Creative agency portfolios showcasing premium design





Event and entertainment websites for visual impact





Loading or transition screens with ambient animation

organization.intended_use:
1. Global Payment & Tax Compliance
Since you are selling a digital service (SaaS) to Shopify merchants globally, tax laws (VAT/GST) can be a nightmare.

Merchant of Record: Polar will handle all the international sales tax and VAT collection. You won't need to register for VAT in every country where you have a customer.

Stripe Rails: Polar uses Stripe’s reliable infrastructure but adds a layer of compliance and developer-friendly features on top.

2. Feature Gating & Entitlements
You can use Polar to manage which features a user can access based on their subscription tier (e.g., Free vs. Pro).

Tiered Access: * Starter: Limited to 50 recovered carts/month.

Pro: Unlimited carts + Advanced Analytics.

Integration: In your Next.js app, you will use the Polar SDK to check a user's "Benefits" (entitlements) before allowing them to trigger a WhatsApp recovery flow.

3. Usage-Based Billing
Since BearReady recovers carts, you could implement a "Pay-per-recovery" model.

Automated Ingestion: Polar allows you to send "usage" data (e.g., how many WhatsApp messages were sent).

Scalability: This ensures your costs (Evolution API resources) stay aligned with your revenue.

4. Technical Implementation (Next.js & Webhooks)
Integrating Polar into your tech stack is straightforward:

Checkout Links: You don't need to build a complex checkout UI. You can generate a Polar Checkout Link and redirect your Shopify users there.

Webhooks: You will set up a webhook endpoint in your Next.js app (e.g., /api/webhooks/polar).

When a payment is successful, the webhook notifies your app to update the isSubscribed status in your database (Prisma/PostgreSQL).

Coolify Deployment: Since you are self-hosting, you simply add your POLAR_ACCESS_TOKEN as an environment variable in your Coolify dashboard
organization.product_description: BearReady is a SaaS (Software as a Service) Application specifically engineered for the Shopify ecosystem. It is designed as a performance-oriented recovery tool that bridges the gap between e-commerce storefronts and direct-to-consumer messaging.

Other pricing notes: prices are **per organization**; only **internal members** count as seats; public users who vote/comment are free.

**Target audience**: Software/product teams and organizations that want a transparent public roadmap/feedback portal tightly coupled to their internal project management (e.g., SaaS companies, teams managing customer feature requests and bugs, and open-source projects).
